privileged_info_summary: The task 'create_course@1' requires creating a new Moodle course with the full name 'Data Science 101', short name 'DS101', and placement in the 'Science' category. These are synthetic test values designed specifically for this task. Evidence confirms successful manual completion on 2026-02-01 with 100% verification score (all 5 criteria met: course exists, fullname correct, shortname correct, category correct, and course newly created). The task runs in a local Moodle environment on http://localhost/ with the Science category pre-existing in the system.
